appDescription: Say Goodbye to Complexity, Easily Create Your AI Model
setupHint: Python environment not configured. Click here to set up.
mlxHint: mlx-lm training framework not installed. Click here to install (Settings → Configure Python Environment).
dragDropHint: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
selectProjectHint: Please select a project from the sidebar first
clearConfirmDataPrepMsg: This will permanently delete all raw files, cleaned data, and training datasets for this project. This action cannot be undone.
clearConfirmTrainingMsg: This will clear all training records and parameter settings. This action cannot be undone.
clearConfirmTestingMsg: This will clear all test message history. This action cannot be undone.
clearConfirmExportMsg: This will clear all export records and logs. Exported model files will not be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

firstSetup.title: Setting up for the first time...

taskLock.datasetGenerating: Dataset generation in progress, please wait
taskLock.modelTraining: Model training in progress, please wait

modelSelector.downloadFrom: Models will be auto-downloaded from {{source}} and cached locally.
modelSelector.modelscopeWarnInline: Current source is ModelScope, which does not support MLX model auto-download. Go to
modelSelector.modelscopeWarnSuffix: to switch to "HF Mirror" for China acceleration + full support.
modelSelector.mlxHint: Apple Silicon optimized MLX quantized models. Switch download source in

disabledReason.ollamaNoLora: GGUF format, not compatible with MLX LoRA training
disabledReason.trainedNotBase: LoRA adapter, not a base model
disabledReason.adapterNoGen: Adapters cannot be used for data generation
disabledReason.lmstudioOnly: Only LM Studio models are supported
disabledReason.notInDaemon: Not available in current Ollama daemon runtime path

modelSelector.noModelsHint: Select a recommended model from the "Online" tab, or browse folder
modelSelector.lmstudioOnlineHint: LM Studio models are managed through the LM Studio app.
modelSelector.lmstudioOnlineDesc: Download and load models in LM Studio, then start the local server. Models will appear in the Local tab.
modelSelector.lmstudioStep1: 1. Download and load a model in LM Studio
modelSelector.lmstudioStep2: 2. Click Developer → Local Server in the left sidebar
modelSelector.lmstudioStep3: 3. Toggle the Status switch to Running at the top (or press ⌘R)
modelSelector.repoIdPlaceholder: Enter HuggingFace model ID, e.g. mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit

ollamaPathMismatch.title: Ollama daemon is not using your configured models path
ollamaPathMismatch.desc: Ollama cannot find the selected model. This usually happens because the daemon was started without loading your custom path configured in Settings. Please check and fix the path.
ollamaPathMismatch.terminalHint: Run the following command in Terminal, replace with your actual path, then restart Ollama:
ollamaPathMismatch.autoFix: Apply configured path and restart Ollama automatically
ollamaPathMismatch.autoFixSuccess: Path applied and Ollama restarted successfully. Please wait a moment then try generating again.
ollamaPathMismatch.noCustomPath: No custom path configured. Please set your Ollama models path in Settings first.
